metadata.description: Deep Suite — structured development, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, document gardening, and harness diagnostics plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: deep-work
plugins.description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — all 24 `/deep-*` slash commands promoted to `user-invocable: true` skills under skills/deep-{verb}/SKILL.md (Category A: 7 thin Skill() wrappers absorbed by their matching skill bodies; Category B: 17 new entry skills with frontmatter + Invocation/Inputs/Prerequisites head sections + byte-preserved bodies) for Codex / Copilot CLI / Gemini CLI / Agent SDK parity. **Fourth and final installment** of the suite-wide command→skill migration (after deep-docs v1.3.0 + deep-evolve v3.4.0 + deep-wiki v1.6.0 — closes cross-platform parity across the entire suite). Emits envelope-wrapped session-receipt + slice-receipt + handoff + compaction-state; non-implement dangerous-command denylist + phase-guard hook golden test + deep-status hub-spoke pattern (4 sub-skills dispatched via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/deep-X/SKILL.md inline Read) + plugin-validator 0/0/0 + skill-reviewer × 24 PASS (v6.7.0+)

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki — all 5 `/wiki-*` slash commands (ingest / lint / query / rebuild / setup) promoted to `user-invocable: true` skills under skills/wiki-{ingest,lint,query,rebuild,setup}/SKILL.md for Codex / Copilot CLI / Gemini CLI / Agent SDK parity (third installment of suite-wide command→skill migration after deep-docs v1.3.0 + deep-evolve v3.4.0; deep-wiki is the largest single conversion — 5 entry surfaces, 4,062 body lines, wiki-ingest alone is 2,841 lines) + body byte-equivalent (mechanical cp + sed retargeting) + plugin-validator 0/0/0 + skill-reviewer × 5 PASS (v1.6.0+)

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — `/deep-evolve` promoted from a slash command to a `user-invocable: true` skill for Codex / Copilot CLI / Gemini CLI / Agent SDK parity (Step 0 / Step 0.5 / Step 1 parsing + Protocol Routing Summary unchanged); v3.4.1 trims `deep-evolve-workflow` description from 1137 → 905 chars to fit Codex's 1024-char skill description limit (Codex was silently dropping the workflow skill at load time). Emits envelope-wrapped evolve-receipt + evolve-insights + reverse handoff + compaction-state with identity-gated chain extraction + protect-readonly hook golden + 4-way manifest drift CI guard (v3.4.1+)

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator — emits envelope-wrapped recurring-findings.json + envelope-aware session-receipt consumer + /deep-review-loop promoted from a slash command to a `user-invocable: true` skill for Codex / Copilot / Gemini CLI / Agent SDK parity (review↔respond auto-iteration with identical §0–§9 protocol) + Codex per-call timeout 900s (v1.6.0+)

plugins.name: deep-docs
plugins.description: Document gardening agent — emits envelope-wrapped last-scan.json + /deep-docs slash command → user-invocable skill conversion for cross-platform parity (Claude Code slash + Codex / Copilot CLI / Gemini CLI `Skill()` invocation) + verify-fixes.sh retargeted to skills/deep-docs/SKILL.md (43 grep checks) + plugin-dev validator round-2 PASS (v1.3.0+)

plugins.name: deep-dashboard
plugins.description: Cross-plugin harness diagnostics + suite telemetry — emits envelope-wrapped harnessability-report.json + envelope-aware collector + 16-metric aggregator (all M4-core post-M5.5: 3 M5-activated handoff/compaction + 1 M5.5-activated per-plugin test coverage from manifest mirror) + JSONL/markdown/OTLP exporters + catalog-drift CI guard with horizon mechanism (suite §9+ extensions reported as info, not drift) + cross-shell `npm test` glob portability (v1.3.5+)
